biological_replicate: INS-1 cells clone 832/13 and COSm6 cells were used for protein expression.
technical_replicate: the sample was blotted for 2 s (blot force −4; 100% humidity) and cryo-plunged into liquid ethane cooled by liquid nitrogen using a Vitrobot Mark III (FEI).
experimental_design: we compare cryoEM structures of a mammalian KATP channel bound to pharmacochaperones
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text.
